description: Designed news-headline card overlaid on a nighttime photograph. The photograph shows a bearded man (Senator Markwayne Mullin) in a light gray polo shirt and dark puffer vest bearing a U.S. Department of Homeland Security patch, speaking outdoors at night, partly turned toward an out-of-focus interviewer at left; a red and orange light glows behind him and faint figures and a parking sign are visible in the dark background. Centered over the lower portion is the white 'FOX NEWS' logo, and beneath it a large bold white serif headline: 'Mullin rips Spanberger for 'criminalizing' DHS while ICE arrests illegal alien felon in her 'sanctuary' state'. A small DHS seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Mullin rips Spanberger for 'criminalizing' DHS while ICE arrests illegal alien felon in her 'sanctuary' state
